name: Eggs Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a small heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Add flour and stir until smooth.
3. Cook 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thickened and bubbly.
5. Remove from heat and set aside.
6. Combine chopped green pepper and onion in an electric blender or food processor; process until smooth.
7. Transfer the mixture to a medium-size nonstick skillet and cook over low heat until tender.
8. Add tomato soup and Worcestershire sauce to the skillet; continue to cook, uncovered, over low heat until thickened.
9. Layer the white sauce, eggs, and soup mixture in a 3-quart cassole dish coated with cooking spray.
10. Top with breadcrumbs.
11. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until breadcrumbs are browned and the mixture is thoroughly heated.
